message:
fix(cli): add extract_json_array helper for robust StdioCapture parsing

Generalize extract_json_block into extract_json_delimited that handles
both {} objects and [] arrays with proper bracket depth tracking.
Replace manual substring slicing in 3 test sites with the new helper
to prevent "trailing characters" errors from parallel test stdout noise.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
